title: cestichis orbiculata
intro: Cestichis orbiculata, also known as the Round-leaved Cestichis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cestichis orbiculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, as well as its ability to improve digestive health and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and other ailments.
